howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps to get the financing you need. Technology that simplifies, humans that care.
howItWorks.step1Description: Fill out our intelligent assessment form that captures your financial profile in minutes. Our system analyzes your information to match you with the best lenders.
howItWorks.step2Description: Get personalized recommendations with probability scores showing your approval chances. Compare interest rates, terms, and features across multiple lenders.
howItWorks.step3Description: Select your preferred lender and complete the application with our guided process. Upload required documents securely through our encrypted platform.
howItWorks.step4Description: Monitor your application status in real-time through your dashboard. Receive instant notifications for document requests, approvals, and disbursement updates.
howItWorks.averageTime: Average end-to-end process time: 3-5 business days

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Rfincare and our loan process
faq.q1: How does Rfincare match me with the right lenders?
faq.a1: Our intelligent algorithm analyzes your financial profile including income, credit score, employment history, and loan requirements. We then match you with lenders who have the highest probability of approving your application based on their specific criteria. This increases your chances of approval while saving you time.
faq.q2: Is my personal and financial information secure?
faq.a2: Absolutely. We use bank-level 256-bit SSL encryption to protect all your data. Our platform is PCI DSS compliant, ISO 27001 certified, and GDPR compliant. We never share your information with third parties without your explicit consent, and all data is stored in secure, encrypted databases with regular security audits.
faq.q3: How long does the loan approval process take?
faq.a3: The timeline varies by lender and loan type. Typically, you'll receive initial approval decisions within 24-48 hours after submitting your application. Personal loans are usually the fastest (1-3 days), while home loans may take 7-14 days due to additional verification requirements. You can track your application status in real-time through your dashboard.
faq.q4: Are there any fees for using Rfincare?
faq.a4: Rfincare is completely free for customers. We earn commissions from our partner banks when you successfully obtain a loan, but this doesn't affect your interest rate or loan terms. You only pay the standard fees charged by your chosen lender, which are clearly disclosed before you apply.
faq.q5: Can I apply for multiple loan types simultaneously?
faq.a5: Yes, you can explore multiple loan options through our platform. However, we recommend focusing on one application at a time to avoid multiple credit inquiries that could impact your credit score. Our assessment helps you identify the best loan type for your needs before you apply.
faq.q6: What documents do I need to apply for a loan?
faq.a6: Common documents include government-issued ID, proof of income (pay stubs or tax returns), bank statements, employment verification, and proof of address. Specific requirements vary by loan type and lender. Our platform provides a personalized document checklist after your initial assessment, and you can upload everything securely through your dashboard.
faq.q7: How do I become a Rfincare agent?
faq.a7: To become an agent, complete our online registration form with your professional details and credentials. Our admin team will review your application within 2-3 business days. Once approved, you'll receive access to our agent portal with comprehensive training materials, client management tools, and commission tracking. No prior financial services experience is required as we provide full training.
faq.q8: What happens if my loan application is rejected?
faq.a8: If your application is rejected, we provide detailed feedback on the reasons and suggestions for improvement. You can work on addressing these factors (such as improving your credit score or reducing debt) and reapply after 3-6 months. Our platform also suggests alternative loan options or lenders that might be a better fit for your current profile.
faq.stillHaveQuestions: Still have questions? We're here to help!
